mapper.select:
select for_code from appr_form where for_code = #{forCode} and com_id = #{comId}
and for_id != #{forId}
select com_id as comId, com_name as companyName from company where com_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' order by com_name asc
select * from appr_form where for_id = #{forId} and for_version = #{forVersion}
mapper.insert: insert into appr_form ( com_id, for_code, for_title, for_content, for_status ) values ( #{comId}, #{forCode}, #{forTitle}, #{forContent}, #{forStatus} )
mapper.update: update appr_form set com_id = #{comId}, for_code = #{forCode}, for_title = #{forTitle}, for_content = #{forContent}, for_status = #{forStatus} where for_id = #{forId} and for_version = #{forVersion}
mapper.insert: insert into appr_form ( for_id, com_id, for_code, for_title, for_content, for_status, created_at, for_version ) values ( #{forId}, #{comId}, #{forCode}, #{forTitle}, #{forContent}, #{forStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{forVersion}+1 )
mapper.delete: delete from appr_form where for_id = #{forId} and for_version = #{forVersion}
